data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Bled But These Gold-Backed Cryptos Preserved Investors' Wealth Last Week
data.description: The cryptocurrency market capped last week on a sour note after Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) crashed to $80,000 on Sunday evening. While the broader market crashed, investors sought refuge in gold-backed coins.

data.title: Palantir Joins S&P 100 After AI-Driven Rally, Stock Surges Almost 60% Since Trump Victory
data.description: Palantir Technologies Inc. will join the S&P 100 index, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced Friday, as the data analytics firm continues its remarkable post-election rally.

data.title: Jamie Dimon Cashed Out $234 Million In JPMorgan Stock, Warren Buffett Stockpiled $334 Billion In Cash — Weeks Later, Markets Crashed. Coincidence?
data.description: Two of Wall Street's most influential figures took significant financial actions just days before a major market downturn, raising questions about market timing and insider knowledge.
